title: eYone Baby Blanket 75×100 cm - Soft Embossed Fleece - Animal Pattern - Lightweight Baby Comforter - Pram, Cot & Stroller - Unisex Gift - Cream
features: SOFT & GENTLE: Double-layer embossed fleece, soft and breathable - cosy warmth without irritation for delicate newborn skin.
PRACTICAL 75×100 CM SIZE: Lightweight blanket for everyday use - fits perfectly in prams, cots, strollers or during tummy time, from newborn to toddler stage.
ANIMAL PATTERN: Cute embossed animals bring joy to the nursery and make this blanket a favourite for little ones.
EASY CARE & DURABLE: Machine washable at 30°C, dries quickly and keeps its shape wash after wash.
GIFT READY: Neutral cream shade with ribbon wrap - a timeless unisex baby gift for showers, first birthdays or newborn celebrations.
description: This soft baby blanket provides soft, gentle comfort for your infant, appropriate for newborns to toddlers, even for a cat or a dog for sleeping. It will surely be a welcome gift for any new mom-to-be. This blanket keeps your little one warm wherever you go. Easy to use and clean, super soft and comfortable, they are still as cozy after washing as before. Great for travel, playtime, bed time and receiving. Soft and lightweight material is good for all seasons and conditions. Available in a selection of versatile colours – pink, blue, milk white, dark grey, light brown. Washing Information Wash before use Do not bleach Machine washable at 30 degrees
